mention.text: @cursorsupport i made an account but i can't connect in the IDE. it keeps failing when i try to sign in

triage.summary: User created an account but IDE sign-in/connection fails. Likely authentication/network issue; provide VPN/auth-method/SSO assignment troubleshooting, then escalate to hi@cursor.com if it persists.

suggested_response: Use doc-backed checks only: confirm whether they’re using a VPN/proxy and suggest turning it off first; suggest waiting a few minutes and starting a new chat; ask them to try signing in with a different authentication method. If they use SSO, verify the user is assigned to the Cursor app in their IdP admin console. Collect: OS, Cursor/IDE version, exact error text, and which auth method (Google vs SSO). If still failing, instruct them to email hi@cursor.com with OS + Cursor version + exact error + repro steps.
suggested_reply: If you’re using a VPN/proxy, turn it off and try signing in again. Also try waiting a few minutes and starting a new chat, and if possible sign in with a different authentication method; if you’re using SSO, make sure your user is assigned to the Cursor app in your IdP. If it still fails, email hi@cursor.com with your OS, Cursor version, and the exact error message.
